daily.topThemeTitle: AI Moves Into the Back Office
daily.topThemeBody: The story of the day is where AI now shows up: students sending AI-written financial-aid appeals, campuses compiling an AI bill of materials to track what's inside their models, ambient sensing tested in classrooms, and Florida State standing up an AI ecosystem. The novelty has moved from the essay to the operations stack.

heroWeek.themeBody: Canvas paused data delivery over a potential security threat, while SonicWall found 61% of exploits land within 48 hours of proof-of-concept and 77% of organizations take over a week to patch.
